remaining_scope.scope: Author-identical disorder ensemble and eigenstate profiles
remaining_scope.reason: The author random seeds and eigenstate selection windows are not public.
The transfer length, QR interval, and Fig. 5 quadrature details are not public.
The source figures were manually assembled in Adobe Illustrator and the project files are unavailable.

compute_assessment.reason: The L=1000 x 3200-realization ensemble and all nine scientific gates are complete; more compute cannot recover unspecified seeds, selection windows, or artwork.

difference_reasons_for_figures.fig3: Independent deterministic disorder seeds and state-selection rules replace unpublished author choices.
difference_reasons_for_figures.fig4: Unpublished transfer/grid choices and artwork change local texture while preserving winding sectors and spectral support.
difference_reasons_for_figures.fig5: Unpublished quadrature and plotting post-processing change contour texture while preserving W_c=2.1.
